Video.summary: Begin your study of federalism with a look at the 2000 presidential election dispute between George W. Bush and Al Gore. Examine the historical and philosophical foundations of federalism.
Video.title: Federalism: America's Great Innovation

Video.summary: Step back to the founding of America to explore the rise of our two-party political system. Professor Hoffmann walks you through six phases of party politics.
Video.title: How Federalism Shapes American Politics

Video.summary: Throughout American history, federal and state governments have clashed over interpretations of the law and states' rights. Survey this rocky relationship across time.
Video.title: States Can't Nullify Federal Law

Video.summary: Although federal law reigns supreme, the Constitution outlines a limited domain for federal authority. Here, you will learn about the federal power of taxing and spending.
Video.title: The Federal Government Can Tax and Spend

Image.alt: The Federal Government Can Tax and Spend
The Federal Government Can Tax and Spend
The Federal Government Can Tax and Spend

Video.summary: National defense is a key function of the government, but our Constitution creates a dual system to ensure a balanced federal government. Dive into this system and explore its implications.
Video.title: Guns, the Military, and Foreign Affairs

Image.alt: Guns, the Military, and Foreign Affairs
Guns, the Military, and Foreign Affairs
Guns, the Military, and Foreign Affairs

Video.summary: Shift your attention to immigration, which has been a complex issue for the United States ever since the 18th century. Explore the challenges of borders, immigration laws, and citizenship.
Video.title: Borders, Immigration, and Citizenship

Video.summary: In this first of two lectures, you will delve into the world of interstate commerce. You will see how the federal power has been curtailed and expanded in different eras.
Video.title: Commerce Clause: A Source of Federal Power

Image.alt: Commerce Clause: A Source of Federal Power
Commerce Clause: A Source of Federal Power
Commerce Clause: A Source of Federal Power

Video.summary: Continue your study of the Commerce Clause by looking at the boundaries of state authority and the impact on interstate economics. Also examine attempts to regulate internet content.
Video.title: Commerce Clause: A Limit on State Power

Image.alt: Commerce Clause: A Limit on State Power
Commerce Clause: A Limit on State Power
Commerce Clause: A Limit on State Power

Video.summary: How much does pop culture get wrong about espionage?
Video.title: Spies: Facts and Fiction

Video.summary: What traits should a spy ideally possess? Which ones shouldn't they possess?
Video.title: The Human Element

Video.summary: Plunge into heated political games involving Britain, Russia, India, and Afghanistan.
Video.title: The Great Game

Video.summary: Examine the various roles women played throughout history as spies.
Video.title: Beyond the Femme Fatale

Video.summary: Uncover covert and intelligence operations employed during WWII by different countries.
Video.title: Strange Bedfellows

Video.summary: Secret codes may be one of the most interesting and intriguing components of espionage.
Video.title: Making Codes, Breaking Codes

Video.summary: Investigate the stories of specific characters in espionage history, such as The Cambridge Five.
Video.title: The Mole and the Hunter

Video.summary: Take a look at an operation so secret, even Prime Minister Winston Churchill didn't know about it.
Video.title: The Art of Counterintelligence

Video.summary: Consider why Pompeii offers more than just a story of cataclysm.
Video.grandparentTitle: Pompeii: Daily Life in an Ancient Roman City
Video.title: Reflections on and of Pompeii

Video.summary: Examine the geological forces that forged the Bay of Naples.
Video.grandparentTitle: Pompeii: Daily Life in an Ancient Roman City
Video.title: Geology and Geography on the Bay of Naples

Image.alt: Geology and Geography on the Bay of Naples
Geology and Geography on the Bay of Naples
Geology and Geography on the Bay of Naples

Video.summary: Uncover the history of Pompeii\'s excavation in the 1700.
Video.grandparentTitle: Pompeii: Daily Life in an Ancient Roman City
Video.title: The Rediscovery of Vesuvian Lands

Video.summary: Delve deep into Pompeii\'s remote Etruscan history.
Video.grandparentTitle: Pompeii: Daily Life in an Ancient Roman City
Video.title: Etruscan Pompeii - 5th Century B.C.

Video.summary: Begin your survey of this amazing year with some context on the state of the world before 1215.
Video.title: The World before 1215

Video.summary: Discover the surprisingly narrowly focused origins of a short-lived document.
Video.title: The Magna Carta: Patching Up a Squabble

Image.alt: The Magna Carta: Patching Up a Squabble
The Magna Carta: Patching Up a Squabble
The Magna Carta: Patching Up a Squabble

Video.summary: Continue your study of the Magna Carta by investigating some of its most interesting clauses.
Video.title: What's Really in the Magna Carta?

Image.alt: What's Really in the Magna Carta?
What's Really in the Magna Carta?
What's Really in the Magna Carta?

Video.summary: In this episode, trace the Magna Carta's intriguing story across the ages.
Video.title: The Magna Carta's Legacy
